title: APIs.guru
overview: Wikipedia for Web APIs. Repository of API definitions in OpenAPI format. **Warning**: If you want to be notified about changes in advance please join our [Slack channel](https://join.slack.com/t/mermade/shared_invite/zt-g78g7xir-MLE_CTCcXCdfJfG3CJe9qA). Client sample: [[Demo]](https://apis.guru/simple-ui) [[Repo]](https://github.com/APIs-guru/simple-ui)

endpoints.summary: Retrieve one version of a particular API
Retrieve one version of a particular API with a serviceName.
List all APIs for a particular provider
List all serviceNames for a particular provider

schemas.name: API

fields.name: added
fields.description: Timestamp when the API was first added to the directory (format: date-time)

fields.name: preferred
fields.description: Recommended version

fields.name: versions
fields.description: List of supported versions of the API

fields.name: versions.{*}
fields.description: additionalProperties is $ref ApiVersion; map keyed by version id, minProperties 1

schemas.constraints: additionalProperties: false; description: Meta information about API; versions is a map (additionalProperties -> ApiVersion, minProperties 1)

schemas.name: APIs

fields.description: additionalProperties is $ref API; map keyed by API IDs (`<provider>[:<service>]`)

schemas.constraints: type object; additionalProperties -> API (map); minProperties 1; description: List of API details. It is a JSON object with API IDs(`<provider>[:<service>]`) as keys.

fields.name: added
fields.description: Timestamp when the version was added (format: date-time)

fields.name: externalDocs
fields.description: Copy of `externalDocs` section from OpenAPI definition (minProperties 1)

fields.name: info
fields.description: Copy of `info` section from OpenAPI definition (minProperties 1)

fields.name: link
fields.description: Link to the individual API entry for this API (format: url)

fields.name: openapiVer
fields.description: The value of the `openapi` or `swagger` property of the source definition

fields.name: swaggerUrl
fields.description: URL to OpenAPI definition in JSON format (format: url)

fields.name: swaggerYamlUrl
fields.description: URL to OpenAPI definition in YAML format (format: url)

fields.name: updated
fields.description: Timestamp when the version was updated (format: date-time)

schemas.name: Metrics

fields.name: datasets
fields.description: Data used for charting etc (items: {})

fields.name: fixedPct
fields.description: Percentage of all APIs where auto fixes have been applied

fields.name: fixes
fields.description: Total number of fixes applied across all APIs

fields.name: invalid
fields.description: Number of newly invalid APIs

fields.name: issues
fields.description: Open GitHub issues on our main repo

fields.name: numAPIs
fields.description: Number of unique APIs (minimum 1)

fields.name: numDrivers
fields.description: Number of methods of API retrieval

fields.name: numEndpoints
fields.description: Total number of endpoints inside all definitions (minimum 1)

fields.name: numProviders
fields.description: Number of API providers in directory

fields.name: numSpecs
fields.description: Number of API definitions including different versions of the same API (minimum 1)

fields.name: stars
fields.description: GitHub stars for our main repo

fields.name: thisWeek
fields.description: Summary totals for the last 7 days

fields.name: thisWeek.added
fields.description: APIs added in the last week

fields.name: thisWeek.updated
fields.description: APIs updated in the last week

fields.name: unofficial
fields.description: Number of unofficial APIs

fields.name: unreachable
fields.description: Number of unreachable (4XX,5XX status) APIs

schemas.constraints: additionalProperties: false; type object; description: List of basic metrics

operational.detail: 來源明示 root security: [] 且無 securitySchemes,此 API 公開無需驗證

Reusable path parameters: `provider` (required string, maxLength 255, minLength 1, example apis.guru), `api` (required string, maxLength 255, minLength 1, example 2.1.0), and inline `service` (required string, maxLength 255, minLength 1, example graph)

missing: No error responses/codes are documented; every operation documents only a 200 OK response
providers.json and {provider}/services.json return inline anonymous object schemas (property `data`: array of strings) that are not named components.schemas entries
